source_file: Who did China ban from flying_.txt
text:
LABOR
                                                                 Because the Judgment Defaulter List is based on a valid court judgment and applies only to those who
                                                                 have the ability to perform on the judgment but refuse to do so, broad enforcement across unrelated
                                                                 fields seems to be an easier pill for some to swallow. I suspect, moreover, that both inside and outside
                                                                 of China many people would also have no objections to enforcement of a no-fly ban extending to the
                                                                 conduct listed in category 2 of the new document, viewing it as just deserts for misconduct. There are
                                                                 many reasons to be concerned however.

One concern is proportionality. Taking the Court Judgment Defaulter system as an example, one can
        Notice on the Release of the                             see that the ‘enforcement’ measures of travel and spending prohibitions can quickly become excessive.
                 Translate
        System for the Elimination of
                                                                 Where a court orders that a person pay token damages, is it reasonable that the same consequences
        Sexual Harassment in the
        Workplace (Reference Text) and                           should be imposed against them for refusal to comply as against those owing years of child support, or
        System for Special Workplace                             responsible for corporate ecological destruction? Again, many will argue that is, as the penalty is for
        Protections of Female Workers
        (Reference Text)
                                                                 the refusal to comply itself, and that the difference in judgments is still taken into consideration as
                                                                 fulfilment of the underlying obligation is the primary requirement for removal from the list.
